differentials.name: Lymphoma: in up to 40% of patients with lymphoma
differentials.raw: Lymphoma: in up to 40% of patients with lymphoma

differentials.name: Gastric carcinoma: in 5-25%, but 50 x more common than lymphoma
differentials.raw: Gastric carcinoma: in 5-25%, but 50 x more common than lymphoma

differentials.name: Eosinophilic gastroenteritis Transpyloric spread by itself does not make a diagnosis of lymphoma because of the higher incidence of gastric cancer!
differentials.raw: Eosinophilic gastroenteritis Transpyloric spread by itself does not make a diagnosis of lymphoma because of the higher incidence of gastric cancer!
